rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND PARKER-GAYLORD VS. DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Thursday,January 22, 2015. Line 2. DEFENDANTS DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE, OCWEN LOAN SERVICES, LLC, and WESTERN PROGRESSIVE, LLC's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to address in its opposition (1) lack of standing to challenge the securitization re: causes of action 1-4 and 7; (2) HBOR re: causes of action 6 and 8; and (3) lack of allegations regarding any promises made by the moving defendants re: cause of action 5. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP VS. CHARLES BYRD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Thursday,January 22,2015. Line 10. DEFENDANT CHARLES BYRD Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories ~GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff shall provide supplement responses to Special Interrogatories 1-3 (re: "lawful termination" see CCP 1161.1) within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Motion is otherwise denied. No sanctions. Moving party prepare order.=(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FEL PROPERTIES B14 DE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. PATRICK HAGEMEISTER REY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion's Calendar for Thursday,January 22,2015. Line 12. DEFENDANTS PATRICK REY, VICTOR JUAREZ, and AZTECA TAQUERIA, INC., DBA CHILANGO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that an action for unlawful detainer should be abated due to previously filed action for breach of contract/declaratory relief. Unlawful detainer is a summary proceeding entitled to priority. Martin-Bragg v. Moore (2013) 219 Cal.App.4th 367 and Lynch & Freytag v. Cooper (1990) 218 Cal.App.3d 603 are not on point. =(501/REQ)
